{"id":"da-cjr","title":"Implement forum connector - scrape Tor-based forums for threat intel","description":"Scrape BreachForums, XSS.is, Exploit.in and similar forums via Tor SOCKS proxy. Use aiohttp with aiohttp-socks through tor_socks_proxy.
